description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-ubuntu-18.04 that runs at midnight UTC and on push and pull request events to the main branch. The workflow should have a job that runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the repository with submodules and full fetch depth, uses ccache, builds with a custom script, and runs specific tests with ctest, but only if the workflow is triggered by a schedule or a pull request with the p4tc label.
